mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, session_id, ticket_type_id, order_code, buyer_reference, channel, quantity, status, hold_expires_at, cancel_expires_at, inventory_returned FROM ticket_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, event_id, session_id, ticket_type_id, order_code, buyer_reference, channel, quantity, status, hold_expires_at, cancel_expires_at, inventory_returned FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'UNPAID' AND hold_expires_at <= #{now}

SELECT id, event_id, session_id, ticket_type_id, order_code, buyer_reference, channel, quantity, status, hold_expires_at, cancel_expires_at, inventory_returned FROM ticket_order WHERE status IN ('UNPAID', 'HOLD_RELEASED') AND cancel_expires_at <= #{now}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_order SET status = 'HOLD_RELEASED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'UNPAID'
UPDATE ticket_order SET status = 'PAID' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'UNPAID'
UPDATE ticket_order SET status = 'CANCELLED', inventory_returned = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('UNPAID', 'HOLD_RELEASED') AND inventory_returned = 0
